_comment: Example of the three diagram keys on content.json. Generic (a typical web app) — replace every node/edge/flow with ones sourced from THIS project's docs/layers/ + ARCHITECTURE.md (+ DIAGRAM_PLAN.md). Never ship these placeholders. x/y are layout coords (top-down). Every node.layer must match a real layer id; every edge source/target must match a node id; every entry in edge.flows must match a flow id — run the integrity check before building.

nodes.label: Browser
nodes.detail: The end user's browser running the single-page app.

nodes.label: Web App
nodes.detail: Serves the UI and calls the API.

nodes.label: API
nodes.detail: HTTP entrypoint; validates and routes requests.

nodes.label: AuthZ / Audit
nodes.detail: Cross-cutting: scopes every request to what the caller may touch, and records an audit event.

nodes.label: Order Service
nodes.detail: Validates and applies the order lifecycle rules.

nodes.label: Database
nodes.detail: Source of truth for orders and customers.

nodes.label: Event Bus
nodes.detail: Order-placed events fan out to async consumers.

nodes.label: Email Worker
nodes.detail: Consumes order events and sends confirmation emails.

nodes.label: Email Provider
nodes.detail: Third-party transactional email API.

nodes.label: Nightly Job
nodes.detail: Batch job that reconciles abandoned carts.

flows.name: Place an order
flows.desc: Browser → API → authorize → order service writes the order → publishes OrderPlaced → the worker emails a confirmation.

flows.name: Read orders
flows.desc: An authorized read: API checks policy, then reads straight from the database.

flows.name: Nightly reconcile
flows.desc: The cron job sweeps abandoned carts and writes corrections directly to the database.

nodes.label: Users
nodes.detail: Browsers hitting the public domain.

nodes.label: DNS
nodes.detail: Resolves the app + API hostnames.

nodes.label: CDN
nodes.detail: Serves static assets from object storage.

nodes.label: Static Assets
nodes.detail: Built SPA bundle; private origin behind the CDN.

nodes.label: Load Balancer
nodes.detail: Terminates TLS, routes to API pods.

nodes.label: API Pods
nodes.detail: Stateless API containers.

nodes.label: Database
nodes.detail: Managed primary database.

nodes.label: Queue
nodes.detail: Buffers async jobs to the worker.

nodes.label: Secrets
nodes.detail: Supplies DB + provider credentials to pods.

nodes.label: CI/CD
nodes.detail: Builds images and deploys via OIDC.

flows.name: Page load
flows.desc: DNS → CDN serves the SPA bundle from private object storage.

flows.name: API request
flows.desc: DNS → load balancer → API pods → database; the pod also enqueues async work.

flows.name: A deploy
flows.desc: CI builds images, rolls the API pods, and syncs + invalidates the static assets.

diagrams.name: Order lifecycle
diagrams._comment: Example opted-in extra: a state machine as a node-graph. kind 'service' here just drives colour; pick kinds that read well for the subject.

nodes.label: CART
nodes.detail: Items added; not yet submitted.

nodes.label: PLACED
nodes.detail: Order submitted; payment pending.

nodes.label: PAID
nodes.detail: Payment captured.

nodes.label: SHIPPED
nodes.detail: Fulfilment dispatched.

nodes.label: CANCELLED
nodes.detail: Cancelled before payment.

flows.name: Cancellation
flows.desc: A placed order times out or is cancelled before payment.
